The court finds that the responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendants in the amount of $6,000, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. Reporter: Lisa M. Metzor, CSR #10707
